children.text:
This is yourmobile assistant to help you with your Spiritual Adoption of the Conceived Child. It will accompany you for the next 9 months of your prayer to help you redeem your commitment of prayer.
Using illustrations we present every week of the child's fetal development. There are also authentic ultrasound pictures and the heart echo scan of development's subsequent stages. You can follow the child grow during the period of Spiritual Adoption and educate your community about the fetal appearance of a human.
We have also preparedrosary considerations for each day and s little surprise...you can read a short child's thought corresponding to a given development stage. You will learn about the stages of human fetal development and become more sensitive about the conceived life.
PS: Daily rosary considerations were prepared by the Foundation-friendly priests, the ultrasound and heart echo scan were delivered by people from all over the country who wanted to contribute to this app.

content-desc: Icon of a conceived child on a backgound of the cross
